data.title: ON Semiconductor Expands with Silicon Carbide Acquisition
data.description:
Pick the best stocks and maximize your portfolio:

  • Discover top-rated stocks from highly ranked analysts with Analyst Top Stocks!
  • Easily identify outperforming stocks and invest smarter with Top Smart Score Stocks

ON Semiconductor ( (ON) ) has issued an update.

onsemi is set to acquire the Silicon Carbide JFET technology business from Qorvo for $115 million, enhancing its power solutions for AI data centers and emerging markets like EV battery disconnects. This acquisition, expected to close in early 2025, aims to boost onsemi’s market opportunity by $1.3 billion within five years by leveraging SiC JFETs for their energy efficiency and cost-effectiveness. This move aligns with onsemi’s strategy to improve energy efficiency and power density, crucial for modern AI workloads.

Learn more about ON stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Sitra Holdings Updates Acquisition Terms for Resort
data.description:
Sitra Holdings (International) Limited (SG:5LE) has released an update.

Pick the best stocks and maximize your portfolio:

  • Discover top-rated stocks from highly ranked analysts with Analyst Top Stocks!
  • Easily identify outperforming stocks and invest smarter with Top Smart Score Stocks

Sitra Holdings (International) Limited has revised its acquisition terms for the remaining interest in Mapur Rocky Resort Limited, extending the reference date for payment completion to 31 December 2026. Payments will continue in cash over five tranches, concluding by 31 December 2031. These changes are not expected to significantly impact the company’s financials for the current year.

For further insights into SG:5LE stock, check out TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: China New Higher Education Group Strengthens Board Leadership
data.description:

Pick the best stocks and maximize your portfolio:

China New Higher Education Group Ltd has appointed Ms. Wong Ka Ki Ada as an independent non-executive director, enhancing its board with her extensive experience in finance and corporate management. Ms. Wong, recognized for her leadership skills and strategic acumen, will also join the company’s audit and nomination committees. This move is seen as a strategic step to strengthen the company’s governance and strategic direction.

data.title: ASE Technology Announces Mixed Revenue Results for November
data.description:
ASE Technology Holding Co (ASX) has released an update.

Pick the best stocks and maximize your portfolio:

  • Discover top-rated stocks from highly ranked analysts with Analyst Top Stocks!
  • Easily identify outperforming stocks and invest smarter with Top Smart Score Stocks

ASE Technology Holding Co. reported a decline in consolidated net revenues for November 2024, with figures showing a 6.2% drop compared to October and a 2.9% decrease year-over-year. Despite this overall decrease, the company’s ATM assembly, testing, and material business saw a 6.3% increase from the previous year. Investors may find these mixed results intriguing as they reflect the company’s performance amid fluctuating market conditions.

For further insights into ASX stock, check out TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: NauticAWT Limited Faces Compulsory Liquidation Hearing
data.description:
NauticAWT Ltd. (SG:42D) has released an update.

Pick the best stocks and maximize your portfolio:

  • Discover top-rated stocks from highly ranked analysts with Analyst Top Stocks!
  • Easily identify outperforming stocks and invest smarter with Top Smart Score Stocks

NauticAWT Limited is facing compulsory liquidation following a winding-up application by Dr. Chirasak Chiyachantana, as confirmed by the company’s Board. Trading of the company’s shares has been suspended since April 2024, and investors are urged to stay informed and consult financial advisors regarding their shares. The court hearing for the winding-up application is scheduled for December 20, 2024.

For further insights into SG:42D stock, check out TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Unity Group Holdings Grants Share Options to Boost Growth

Pick the best stocks and maximize your portfolio:

  • Discover top-rated stocks from highly ranked analysts with Analyst Top Stocks!
  • Easily identify outperforming stocks and invest smarter with Top Smart Score Stocks

Unity Group Holdings International Limited has granted 166,724,000 share options, representing about 4.84% of its issued share capital, to directors and employees under its Share Option Scheme. The options, priced at HK$0.410 per share, are set to vest over one to two years, encouraging long-term alignment with the company’s growth. Notably, the share options have no performance targets or clawback mechanisms, reflecting a focus on future share price appreciation.
